notes: Final PolymythCAL pre-deploy hardening based on Audit 18.
Aligned Netlify, local development, and GitHub Actions on Node.js 24.
Moved the production build chain into package.json and made Netlify call npm run build.
Pinned the sole production dependency exactly and verified its lockfile integrity record.
Added multi-platform clean-build CI, scheduled dependency health checks, and Dependabot configuration.
Added a structured native VoiceOver and NVDA sign-off issue template while retaining the complete manual protocol.
Made browser audit scripts portable across local Chromium and Playwright-managed Chromium installations.
Updated release and PolymythCAL build metadata to the current 839-event corpus and current audit counts.
Preserved the privacy cleanup, lightweight calendar shell, saved searches, bilingual filters, feeds, forms, event pages, aliases, and ICS files.
